name: Poppy Seed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, softened butter, and grated orange peel until well combined.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and ground nutmeg.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the creamed mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Gently fold in the golden raisins, chopped pecans, and poppy seeds until evenly distributed.
6. Grease a muffin tin and spoon the batter into the cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for approximately 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
